## Description

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (protocol/SDK/docs)
- [ ] New feature (protocol/SDK/docs)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New example or integration
- [ ] Conformance test addition

## Checklist

- [ ] All commits are signed off (DCO: `git commit -s`)
- [ ] No proprietary algorithm details in code or comments
- [ ] No real user data, secrets, or internal endpoints
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Tests pass (`cd certification && cargo test` if applicable)
